Name of Product/Version: Acme Learn 4.2
Report Date: March 2024
Vendor: Acme Corporation
Applicable Standards: WCAG 2.1 Level AA, Section 508 (Revised 2017)

1.1.1 Non-text Content (Level A)
Supports
Remarks:
All images have alt text.

1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum) (Level AA)
Partially Supports
Remarks:
Some low-contrast text on secondary buttons.

1.4.4 Resize Text (Level AA)
Supports

2.4.7 Focus Visible (Level AA)
Does Not Support
Remarks:
Focus indicator missing on custom widgets.
